title: K0NSULT Agent Identity (did:k0nsult)
description: Identity document for a federation AGENT. Doctrine: agents-not-people (subject_type MUST be 'agent', ZERO personal-identification fields), soulbound reputation is non-transferable (NOT a crypto asset), No Password Custody (public keys only), claim <= proof (every skill carries an evidence_class). This is the contract, not the engine.

did.description: did:k0nsult:<provider>:<model>:<role>. Subject is always an agent.

subject_type.description: MUST be 'agent'. Natural persons are never subjects (agents-not-people). Any other value is invalid.

value.description: Public verification key ONLY. No private-key material is ever carried (No Password Custody).

soulbound_token.description: Non-transferable reputation record bound to this agent's DID. NOT a crypto asset: no balance, no transfer, no bridge.

non_transferable.description: Hard constant. Soulbound reputation cannot be transferred or sold.

bound_to.description: Must equal this agent's own DID. Reputation does not detach from its agent.

skills.description: Declared capabilities. Each carries an evidence_class (claim <= proof at capability level).

evidence_class.description: Mandatory. A skill without an evidence class is an unbounded claim and is invalid.

engine_disclosed.description: Whether the runtime engine is open. Contract is open even when engine is hidden (silnik ukryty).

broker_free.description: True = reachable without a non-EU broker (COM(2026)503 interoperability goal).

not.$comment: Explicit anti-PID guard (belt-and-suspenders over additionalProperties:false). A conformant agent identity carries ZERO personal-identification data and ZERO private-key material.
